next_step_text: Hi Casper, Good to hear from you. We would like to involve the OpCos at this stage by asking them to review the shortlisted suppliers and provide input into the final selection. We are currently confirming a few time options with BA and will share confirmed dates shortly. In the meantime, it would be helpful for you to be prepared to present to BA in the near term, with a primary focus on demonstr

buyer_dependent_items.text: Share confirmed BA demo dates and time options
Provide specific invoice status terminology used by BA team

competitive_position.summary: No competitor identified. The Next Step message confirms Zycus is one of multiple 'shortlisted suppliers' under IAG GBS evaluation, but no rival vendor has been named in any Salesforce field, call, or task. The buyer's pain points (manual vendor data entry, lack of bank validation alternatives, supplier onboarding inefficiencies) suggest no robust incumbent SRM platform is in place today, implying either a greenfield opportunity or displacement of manual/legacy processes. Without knowing the shortlist, the competitive wedge is unclear. The immediate action is to ask Kelly Eastman-Thompson who else is being evaluated and what the current state looks like, so we can position our functional depth (iSource, iSupplier, iRequest integration) and Merlin AI data enrichment as the differentiator.

champion_strength.source: SF OpportunityContactRole, Avoma demo call 25 Jun 2026, SF Next_Step__c
champion_strength.summary: Champion is developing. Kelly Eastman-Thompson (Category Lead - IT Software) is actively coordinating the evaluation and driving OpCo involvement, but has not yet demonstrated executive access, internal advocacy for Zycus, or influence over the final decision. No evidence of her introducing us to the Economic Buyer, pushing back on competitors, or sharing internal docs. Strength is developing because she is engaged and project-managing the review, but we need to convert her to an active advocate with EB access.

sources: SF OpportunityContactRole query: 2 buyer-side roles, neither marked Economic Buyer or Executive Sponsor
Avoma demo call 25 Jun 2026 attendee list: no CFO, Head of Procurement, or C-level sponsor present
meddpicc_economic_buyer.narrative: No Economic Buyer has been identified or engaged. The 25 Jun 2026 demo call included Category Lead Kelly Eastman-Thompson and operational contacts from British Airways (Linda Bode, Jennifer Willis), Iberia (mjalmendros, crodrigueza), Vueling (Irene Dominguez, Anna Buruaga), and Piotr Banasik (Loyalty & Customer Operations Manager), but no CFO, Head of Procurement, or C-level sponsor participated. The Next Step message references involving OpCos in the supplier review, but does not name who will approve budget or sign the contract. The Salesforce opportunity carries no Contact Role marked Economic Buyer or Executive Sponsor. At this stage (Formal Evaluation, 6 months in, 188 days to close) the absence of EB engagement is a critical gap. The immediate move is to ask Kelly Eastman-Thompson who will approve the budget and sign the contract, and to request an introduction to that person within the next 14 days.

recommended_moves: Ask Kelly who approves budget and signs the contract, request EB introduction.
Ask Kelly who else is shortlisted and what the current state looks like.
Add Linda Bode, Jennifer Willis, Irene Dominguez, Anna Buruaga, and Iberia representatives as OpportunityContactRoles and multi-thread directly.
